user_query: On fathers third day, add a superfood breakfast

fields.name: Superfood Chia & Berry Power Bowl
fields.short_description: A nutrient-dense bowl of chia pudding topped with mixed berries, spinach-blended yogurt, nuts and seeds — antioxidant-rich, high in fiber and omega-3s for lasting energy.
fields.meal_suggestion: The night before, mix 3 tablespoons chia seeds with 1 cup unsweetened almond milk (or milk of choice) and a drizzle of honey or maple syrup; refrigerate overnight. In the morning, lightly blend a handful of fresh spinach with 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt and a splash of water until smooth. Stir the spinach-yogurt into the chia pudding for a mild green boost. Top with a mix of blueberries, strawberries, 1 tablespoon hemp seeds, 1 tablespoon chopped walnuts, and a few slices of banana. Finish with a sprinkle of cinnamon and a small spoonful of almond butter if desired.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides plant-based omega-3s and fiber from chia and hemp seeds, antioxidants and vitamin C from berries, protein and calcium from Greek yogurt, and heart-healthy fats from walnuts and almond butter. A balanced, low-prep superfood breakfast that supports sustained energy, digestive health, and recovery.

result.reasoning: Appended to Father's Day 3 breakfast list (position -1) to add a superfood option that complements the existing fruit/nut plate, overnight oats, and whole-grain pancakes with a high-fiber, omega-3–rich choice.
